flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tennessee College of Applied Technology Nashville fell 100% between 2017 and 2020 (23.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology Nashville rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (60.2% → 81.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tennessee College of Applied Technology Nashville rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (73.1% → 84.9%).
